## Definition of Done (PRD §10.3)

- [ ] Tests added/updated and green (unit / integration / e2e as applicable)
- [ ] Coverage gates pass (`packages/core` ≥ 95%)
- [ ] `pnpm format && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck` clean
- [ ] CZ + EN strings added for any new UI
- [ ] a11y checks pass (axe), no new violations
- [ ] Docs updated (README / PRD / self-hosting) if needed
- [ ] Changeset added for user-facing changes (`pnpm changeset`)
